name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: type=layout requires fixable in {whitespace, null}, so layout + fixable=code is rejected
command:
printf 'id: g-ts-304
type: layout
fixable: code
' > g-ts-304.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-304.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'type=layout requires fixable in {whitespace, null}' err.txt && echo cross_set 1>&2
